hero.title: Barcelona, Refined.
hero.description: An elegant intersection of human intuition and urban motion. Designed for those who seek uniqueness in every journey.
hero.status: Discretion in every detail. Distinction in every move.

features.title: Bespoke services. One orchestrated vantage.
features.description: Handcrafted concierge intelligence for mobility, habitation, and executive clarity.

taxis.body: A master perspective of the city's premier fleet, moving in silent harmony.

hotels.title: Curated Habitation
hotels.body: Bespoke stays aligned with Barcelona's most distinguished addresses.

analytics.body: Transforming urban complexity into clear, handcrafted intelligence.

landing.provenanceTitle: Born in Barcelona. Crafted for the Individual.
landing.provenanceBody: Royale One was conceived to transform the standardized into the bespoke. We are the silent architects of the city's most elegant journeys, blending refined local knowledge with a warm, discreet touch.
landing.signatureStep1Body: Express your desire through our spatial search.
landing.signatureStep2Body: Our intelligence aligns the city's premier assets.
landing.signatureStep3Body: Experience the transition from data to distinction.
landing.testimonyQuote1: "The only vantage point that understands the pulse of Eixample as well as I do."
landing.testimonyQuote2: "Discretion meets absolute synchrony. A masterpiece of urban orchestration."

footer.bottomRow: © 2026 Royale One Concierge. All Rights Reserved. System Integrity Confirmed.
